basic_details.short_information: Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) Young Professional-I Notification 2026 has been released on 02 June 2026 on the official website www.angrau.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ANGRAU Young Professional-I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/women

qualification.education_qualification: 4 years Bachelor's Degree in Agriculture or Diploma in Agriculture from ICAR accredited University/College
qualification.details: 4 years Bachelor's Degree in Agriculture or Diploma in Agriculture from ICAR accredited University/College. Candidates with experience in recording, computer knowledge, documentation, and report writing are preferable.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ANGRAU Young Professional-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Young Professional-I post at ANGRAU is scheduled for 11th June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional-I post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is a 4 years Bachelor's Degree in Agriculture or a Diploma in Agriculture from an ICAR accredited University/College.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Young Professional-I position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Young Professional-I post is between 21 years and 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/women candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional-I post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Young Professional-I post at Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Young Professional-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Nandyal, Andhra Pradesh. The specific venue details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Are candidates with computer knowledge and documentation experience preferred?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with experience in recording, computer knowledge, documentation, and report writing are preferred for this position.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs.
